emails.subject: RE: This Meeting Could Have Been an Email 😅
emails.preview: I spent 6 hours in meetings today and got nothing done. My calendar is a wall of blue. We need a better way to make meetings actually productive...

emails.subject: Where's that doc again?
emails.preview: I spent 20 minutes trying to find the Q3 report someone mentioned in the meeting. By the time I found it, we'd moved on. This happens every single call...

emails.subject: Did anyone write down the action items?
emails.preview: I was so focused on presenting that I didn't capture the action items from the discussion. Does anyone have notes from yesterday's standup?

emails.subject: This EchoLens thing is mindblowing 🤯
emails.preview: Just watched the demo. It's like having a brilliant assistant who knows everything you're talking about and surfaces it instantly. When can we pilot this?

emails.subject: 🏆 Submission Received: EchoLens
emails.preview: Your team's submission 'EchoLens: Real-Time Presentation Intelligence' has been received. Good luck!

documents.title: The_$37B_Meeting_Problem.pdf
documents.preview: Research: Professionals waste 31 hours/month in unproductive meetings. $37B lost annually to meeting inefficiency. Primary issues: context switching, missed information, no real-time support...

documents.title: EchoLens_Technical_Architecture.docx
documents.preview: System Design: Speech-to-Text → Intent Classifier → Orchestrator → Specialized Agents (Chart, Context, Summary, Reference) → WebSocket Real-time Push → React UI...

documents.title: Demo_Script_Keynote.md
documents.preview: Demo Flow: 1. Hook with the problem 2. Show the solution 3. Live demo with real-time intent classification 4. Technical deep dive 5. Future vision...

documents.title: Competitive_Analysis_Q1.xlsx
documents.preview: Competitors: Otter.ai (transcription only), Fireflies (summarization), Recall.ai (recording). Gap: None provide REAL-TIME contextual intelligence during presentations...

slack.message: Demo is looking solid! Remember: the magic is that EchoLens proves its own value BY working during our presentation. Meta! 🎯
All 9 intent types working: DATA_CLAIM, REFERENCE, EMAIL_MENTION, DOC_MENTION, TOPIC_SHIFT, KEY_POINT, DECISION, ACTION_ITEM, QUESTION. Chart agent generating Mermaid diagrams beautifully.
WebSocket latency down to ~200ms end-to-end. Intent classification + agent dispatch + UI update all happening in near real-time. We're ready! 🚀
